tool.name: MAIQMag MCVine (NERSC)
tool.command: #from pathlib import Path #import re #set $experiment = re.sub('[\W]', '_', str($experiment)) #set $results_folder=str($project_dir)+"/maiqmag/simulations/" + str($experiment)+"/macvine_results" mkdir sample_inputs && tar -xf $inputs -C sample_inputs/ && for input in \$(realpath sample_inputs/*); do echo "podman-hpc run --rm --group-add keep-groups -e HDF5_USE_FILE_LOCKING=FALSE -e OMPI_MCA_btl_tcp_if_include=lo -it -v $project_dir:$project_dir mcvine /app/run.sh --beam=$beam --results_folder=$results_folder --n_count=$ncount --n_proc=$nproc --input_file=\$input" >> commands.sh ;done && $project_dir/maiqmag/mcvine_nersc/driver.sh commands.sh $njobs > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2) && rm -rf sample_inputs && tar -cf $output_archive -C $results_folder .
tool.help:
**MCVine**
This is a Galaxy tool to run MCVine simulations for MAIQMag project. It currently only runs on NERSC Perlmutter supercomputer.
